Chronology of every recorded fact about [[High Council (The Elder Empire: Shadow)]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — The High Council sentenced Lucan to life imprisonment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 12''' — The High Council consists of three Architects who sit in the open around a short white column.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The High Council has orders for Shera.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — The High Council would consider Shera worth more than all the Gardeners combined.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 12''' — The High Council issues commands to Gardeners.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The High Council consists of three members.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 5''' — The High Council wanted Shera to kill the Emperor ahead of schedule.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The High Council is a group that may have known about the Emperor's plan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The High Council ordered the room containing the coffins to be sealed up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — The High Council did not make the decision regarding Yala's status alone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 13''' — The High Council makes decisions about the fate of the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — The High Council has the power to execute Consultants who reveal Guild secrets.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
